title: IP Subnetting Practice Lab
description: Hands-on exercises working through Class C subnetting, CIDR notation, wildcard masks, and designing subnets for a small office network. All done in Packet Tracer.

title: ML Algorithm Comparison Notebook
description: A systematic experiment comparing Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, SVM, and KNN on the same dataset. Tracks accuracy, training time, and confusion matrices.

title: Caesar Cipher Cracker
description: A Python script that cracks Caesar cipher-encoded text using frequency analysis — no brute force needed. Supports auto-detection of shift value.

title: Spotify Tracks EDA
description: Exploratory data analysis on 600K+ Spotify tracks. Investigated what features (tempo, energy, danceability) correlate most strongly with song popularity.

title: Simple Port Scanner
description: A lightweight multi-threaded TCP port scanner built with Python's socket library. Scans a target IP for open ports and identifies common services.
